seo.defaultTitle: Optim | Creativity that captures. Calculation that converts.
seo.defaultDescription: Optim builds strategic marketing systems powered by creativity that captures and calculation that converts: strategy, content, paid media, branding, web and CRM aligned for growth.

home.title: Optim | Strategic marketing agency
home.description: Optim home page: strategy, creativity, performance media, branding, web and CRM connected in one growth system.

about.title: About Optim | Strategy, clarity and execution
about.description: Learn about Optim's philosophy, method and business branches for brands that need commercial structure.

services.title: Services | What we do and how we do it
services.description: Strategic marketing, content, paid media, branding, web and CRM services explained through a business lens.

pricing.title: Pricing | Packages and operating models
pricing.description: Explore Optim's base plans and pricing for strategy, content, performance and commercial systems.

contact.title: Contact | Book a diagnostic with Optim
contact.description: Form, map, phone numbers and social links to get in touch with Optim and start a strategic diagnostic.

hero.headline: We do not build generic marketing.
hero.subheadline: Optim creates growth systems where each idea captures and every decision converts. Strategy, content, media, branding, web and CRM working as one mechanism.

slides.title: Messaging that stops the scroll and sharpens brand perception.
slides.description: Concept, narrative and production built to make a brand feel premium, memorable and hard to ignore.

slides.title: Decisions backed by intent, data and disciplined optimization.
slides.description: We plan media, measure signals and adjust with rigor so attention turns into real commercial opportunities.

slides.title: From strategy to CRM, without disconnected pieces.
slides.description: We connect positioning, funnels, sites, campaigns and automation so the business scales with coherence.

pillars.title: Two forces working in the same direction.
pillars.description: Creativity without structure only entertains. Calculation without narrative goes cold. Optim works where both forces coordinate to move business.

items.title: Creativity that captures
items.description: We build concepts, assets and experiences that feel native to the context and difficult to forget. Every format is made to earn the right attention.

items.title: Calculation that converts
items.description: We define hypotheses, measure signals and optimize distribution so investment moves closer to the result. We do not chase vanity metrics.

servicesPreview.title: A marketing system, not a list of deliverables.

process.title: Five steps to move from improvisation to structure.

steps.title: Diagnostic
steps.description: We read the starting point, detect friction and define where the real opportunity sits.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.description: We translate business into messaging, channels, offer and a measurable priority system.

steps.title: Production
steps.description: We develop assets and experiences with visual consistency and commercial intent.

steps.title: Distribution
steps.description: We activate paid and organic channels to place the right message in front of the right audience.

steps.title: Optimization
steps.description: We adjust creative, targeting, funnels and automation to sustain performance.

branches.title: A group specialized for different contexts.

items.name: Optim MKT Digital
items.description: Growth systems for brands that need commercial clarity, content and performance under one operating logic.

items.name: Optim MKT Inmobiliario
items.description: Lead generation, follow-up and conversion for developments, brokers and real estate firms competing for qualified attention.

items.name: Optim Creator Studios
items.description: Positioning, narrative and monetization for creators ready to operate like a serious brand.

items.name: Optim Productions
items.description: Premium audiovisual production for campaigns, commercial assets and high-impact brand pieces.

companies.title: The company collection powers living social proof.
companies.description: Case entries, industries and results loaded from content so the landing does not depend on hardcoded proof.

items.name: Juan Pérez
items.description: Thanks to Optim we consolidated our message and sales increased 150% in the first quarter. A highly strategic and capable team.

items.name: Ana Rodríguez
items.description: They did not just design a beautiful site — they built a commercial system that brings us qualified business opportunities every single day.

items.name: Carlos Gómez
items.description: Before, our media and creative were disconnected. Optim unified everything into a system that works perfectly from the click to the close.

items.name: María Fernández
items.description: They understood our vision perfectly and translated it into a brand narrative and a landing page that never stopped converting.

closing.title: If the business needs structure, it starts here.
closing.description: We schedule a diagnostic to identify critical fronts, conversion opportunities and the system worth building first.

hero.title: Optim is an agency built to connect perception with results.
hero.description: We combine creative direction, strategic thinking and commercial operations to build brands with clear presence and measurable conversion.

story.title: The idea behind Optim
story.description: We were built to solve a recurring friction: brands with real ambition but fragmented execution. Optim turns that energy into a system where the brand looks solid, media serves the business and follow-up stops slipping through loose spreadsheets.

items.title: Clarity over volume
items.description: We prefer precise messaging, clear priorities and decisions that can be justified.

items.title: System over improvisation
items.description: Every campaign, site or asset should connect to an operating structure that can sustain it.

items.title: Aesthetics with function
items.description: Form matters when it improves perception, comprehension and conversion.

aboutPage.teamNote: We work as a strategic cell: strategy, creativity, production, media and automation aligned around one reading of the business.

hero.title: What we do and how we do it.
hero.description: We optimize perception, acquisition and follow-up inside one system. Each service has a clear function within the commercial architecture.

intro.title: We do not sell isolated pieces.
intro.description: Our services can operate independently, but they perform best when integrated. The goal is to build a growth system where narrative, channels and follow-up stay connected.

services.title: Marketing Strategy
services.summary: We define the commercial and creative map before production starts.
how: Roadmap with priorities, KPIs and operating rhythm.

services.title: Content Creation
services.summary: We create assets with narrative intent and distribution value.

services.title: Digital Advertising
services.summary: We manage Meta Ads and Google Ads with business focus and fast learning loops.
how: Performance optimization based on real signals.

services.title: Branding
services.summary: We organize perception so the brand feels consistent and strategic.
how: Core applications for content and web.

services.title: Websites and Landing Pages
services.summary: We create fast, clear experiences designed for the next decision.

services.title: CRM Integration
services.summary: We connect marketing with follow-up so opportunities are not lost.
how: Traceability between lead, follow-up and closing.

method.title: How we operate
items: We listen to the commercial context before proposing deliverables.
We design a concrete implementation route.
We produce assets with strategic intent.
We distribute and measure to learn fast.
We iterate on signals, not assumptions.

hero.title: Clear packages for different levels of need.
hero.description: Base pricing to help you evaluate the level of system you need. Every final proposal adjusts to scope, volume and industry.

plans.name: Base
plans.description: For brands that need to organize messaging, presence and a first acquisition structure.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: For businesses already selling and ready for a more serious content, media and follow-up system.
features: Meta Ads and Google Ads management

plans.name: Scale
plans.description: For brands or developments that need integral operation, speed and higher iteration capacity.

custom.title: Need a custom proposal?
custom.description: We also take project-based work: branding, sites, launch campaigns, audiovisual production or focused CRM implementation.

pricingPage.note: Prices in MXN. Ad spend and advanced third-party production costs are not included.

hero.title: Book a diagnostic and let’s talk with context.
hero.description: Tell us what you are building, what you already tried and where the main friction lives. We design the conversation to be useful from the first touchpoint.
